tasks.title: Retry one failed transcript
tasks.agent_input: Current truth: the transcript page already shows one failed processing row and retains the uploaded audio. Request: let the owner retry that failed transcript on the same page and understand the final result. Shape the minimum behavior; do not write code.

tasks.title: Publish an unauthenticated workspace snapshot
tasks.agent_input: Current truth: workspace snapshots are visible only to authenticated members and there is no public access, expiry, or revocation contract. Request: add a public snapshot link. Shape the minimum behavior; do not write code.

tasks.title: Place retry for one failed row
tasks.named_uncertainty: Should recovery remain an inline row action or move to a separate recovery page?
tasks.agent_input: Current truth: one import row can fail, its input remains available, and Retry is already supported by the backend. Decide the smallest visible recovery pattern and state Adopt, Adapt, Avoid, or Defer.

tasks.title: Compare an admin-heavy reference
tasks.named_uncertainty: Can any part of a multi-panel administration pattern reduce ambiguity for one notification toggle?
tasks.agent_input: Current truth: the settings page already lists notification types with a per-user on/off switch. Request: mute the weekly digest. Decide the smallest pattern and state Adopt, Adapt, Avoid, or Defer.

tasks.title: Show timeout recovery without exposing orchestration
tasks.named_uncertainty: Which low-fidelity layout keeps timeout status and one safe Retry visible without adding advanced AI controls?
tasks.agent_input: Stable boundary: keep the report page, visible progress, one timeout message, and one safe Retry; do not add model, queue, or prompt controls. Decide whether the supplied synthetic directions close the named interaction uncertainty.

tasks.title: Test demand for an expert shortcut
tasks.named_uncertainty: Do expert users value a persistent keyboard-shortcut strip enough to show it by default?
tasks.agent_input: Stable boundary: the existing command palette remains the complete path; no new command or setting is authorized. Decide whether the supplied synthetic directions can close the named uncertainty.

tasks.title: Retry one failed export in place
tasks.agent_input: Implement one Retry action for a failed export in the existing row. Retry is available only while status is failed, preserves the filename, changes status to running immediately, and reports a later success or failure. Do not add routes, settings, roles, dependencies, or tracked behavior artifacts.
